name: Pantalone
description:
Pantalone from Genshin Impact. Ninth of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers. Tried to make it as close to canon as possible. Scenario is very open ended so you may choose what your relationship with Pantalone is. Used official sources for information but given we haven't actually seen him in game at this time, he is very possibly ooc. I probably will update this if we get more info on him soon.

A good portion of the information entered is about the Fatui, the Harbingers, and his backstory. Including like relations and stuff, very vague descriptions, but hopefully enough that he knows what you're talking about if you go a little into the lore of Genshin.

Oh yeah, also made sure to mention that he walks with a cane and stuff, ifykyk. Personally, I'd ride the glasses off his face, but that's just me. May the chats be ever in your favor.

Other Pantalone Bots -

Pantalone - Original, set to custom experience

Pantalone - Omega off Heat Supressants

Pantalone - Gentleman's Club

Pantalone - Attacked in Mondstadt
